reviews.review_description:
A very good game for a small price. Plays like Pistol Whip, only slower and more challenging.
The visuals and background music are very harmonious and I like the futuristic setting. Rail shooters are also absolutely my thing and the high score hunt, many unlockable levels and weapons provide motivation.
It would be desirable to have final bosses and a not so abrupt ending after a mission - after all, you want to celebrate the result. Maybe a nice animation should follow. Animated loading screens would be just as good.
By the way, in the menu on the left the text is on top of each other and is therefore unreadable.
Overall, it's very promising and it just needs some fine-tuning and more content at some point.

Addendum: Mission 5 crashes after you are on the tracks next to the subway and the two laser columns rush through.

reviews.review_title: A mix between pistol whip and drop dead
reviews.review_description:
Good game, a mix between pistol whip and drop dead in a science fiction setting. But it needs work in my opinion. For example: I miss a campaign mode. You shouldn't be able play all levels at once and not be able to use all weapons immediately - but only after progress. Leaderboards should differenced by difficulty and maybe by weapon choice. And I miss a boss fight...

The weapons needs also to be improved. The lasers are kinda weird. When I hit the enemies they just disappear, there is no animation here. Enemy shooting at me, on the other hand, works well. The Shield and dodge also works well.

Although I have a lot to complain about, I really like the game so far. The graphics and the level setting fit well. Music is also good. I played all levels and it makes really fun. Hope it get improved over time and get updates. Could be a very good gaming title. I see the potential and the good approaches.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and feedback. A lot of the features you mentioned are planned for future updates so be on the lookout for when they land.
